name: openhands_control_plane_assimilation
description: OpenHands assimilation template for control-plane event-loop, replay, agent-registry, and limit-control mechanics.

subtemplates.description: OpenHands controller export lane that keeps public controller surfaces intentionally narrow and imports implementation through one named controller boundary.
